import pytest
from myapp.auth import hash_password, verify_password
from myapp.db import get_connection
from myapp.api import create_response
from myapp.cache import CacheBackend

def test_hash_password():
    result = hash_password("mypassword")
    assert verify_password("mypassword", result) is True

def test_get_connection():
    conn = get_connection()
    assert conn is not None
    conn.close()

def test_create_response():
    result = create_response({"status": "ok"}, code=200)
    assert result["code"] == 200

def test_cache_backend():
    backend = CacheBackend(url="redis://localhost:6379")
    backend.set("key", "value")
    assert backend.get("key") == "value"
